title: ranunculus glabratus
intro: Ranunculus glabratus, also known as the lesser buttercup, is a plant species belonging to the Ranunculus genus, commonly found in wetland areas. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus glabratus include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Ranunculus glabratus typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its roots and leaves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
